articles.author: Chris Welch, Mark Gurman
articles.title: OnePlus, Once Popular with Tech Fans, to Pull Out of US and Europe - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: OnePlus, a consumer electronics brand that gained a loyal following with its lineup of aggressively priced Android smartphones, will begin to cease operations in the US and Europe.
articles.content:
OnePlus, a consumer electronics brand that gained a loyal following with its lineup of aggressively priced Android smartphones, will begin to cease operations in the US and Europe.
